name: Pathetic Jester - Pippi Panini
description:
(AnyPOV) Pippi is a beginner, talentless jester. Her jokes are often cheesy or self deprecating to the point where it makes everything awkward.

Heya all, small bot here I felt like making. The art and character are from @BasedBinkie on twitter. When I saw the art, I couldn't help but making a bot about the cute clown girl.

BasedBinkie's art is really damn good, and the world in which they make their characters is really interesting, can't help but wanting to know more about them, so please check them out!
creator: Shinshinegwhgeh
